title: Nintendo Music Addon
description: Music from nintendo games(mostly mario) replacing vanilla, biomesoplenty, theaether, deeperanddarker ingame music
body:
_Handpicked Nintendo songs to replace vanilla and modded in-game songs **Including:**_

Super Mario

Animal Crossing

The Legend of Zelda

Wii Fit

Wii Sports

Tomodachi Life

_unzip the pack to see song credits_

**_Supports biomesoplenty, theaether, deeper and darker, twilight forest_**


**originally made just for my use but wanted to upload anyway
